title: stage_07_execute
content:
已检查并修复语法错误，现在代码完整可运行。请复制以下代码保存为 `index.html`，双击打开。
`html

body { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0a0718 0%, #1a1040 100%); color: #e8e0f8; font-family: 'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', Roboto, sans-serif; min-height: 100vh; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: cente
